name: Hyaluronic Acid
summary: Hyaluronic Acid supports skin hydration; joints; lubrication with moderate confidence in this merged decision layer.
description: Hyaluronic acid supports tissue hydration and joint lubrication; evidence-informed use focuses on symptom-support contexts rather than disease reversal claims.
safetyNotes: Usually tolerated; keep pregnancy/lactation claims conservative.

claimMap.claim: v9.7: Oral HA evidence is limited/product-specific; injection meta-analyses should not be used to market oral supplements.
claimMap.notes: v9.7: Oral HA evidence is limited/product-specific; injection meta-analyses should not be used to market oral supplements.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: Oral sodium hyaluronate products are study-specific; injectable HA evidence does not translate to oral supplements
